description: Digitized with Roxio Easy VHS to DVD Plus 3 This is supplemental material played on side 3 of Disney's "Bedknobs and Broomsticks" 25th Anniversary LD. Chapter 27: Reconstruction Of Missing Musical Number "A Step in the Right Direction" Chapter 28: Original Release Trailer #1 Chapter 29: Original Release Trailer #2 Chapter 30: Original Release Trailer #3 Chapter 31: 1979 Reissue Trailer Disclaimer: I do not own any content in this video. This is uploaded for archival, educational, and research purposes.
